basic_details.job_title: NFDC General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Film Development Corporation (NFDC) General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.nfdcindia.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NFDC General Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years, OBC-NCL: 03 Years, PwBD: 10 Years, Ex-Servicemen: 03 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Ph-D or 2 years full time Post Graduation degree/Post Graduate Diploma
qualification.details: Ph-D or 2 years full time Post Graduation degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Mass Communication/Film Studies/Mass Media/Journalism/Film Archiving. Desired: Diploma/Certificates in Film Studies/Media Studies/Film Archiving/Curating Programmer.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nfdcindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NFDC General Manager (North) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the NFDC General Manager (North) post is 15 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Manager (North) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph-D or a 2-year full-time Post Graduation degree/diploma in Mass Communication, Film Studies, Mass Media, Journalism, or Film Archiving. A diploma/certificate in related fields is also desired.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Manager (North) post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST, OBC-NCL, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Manager (North) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 100,000 to Rs. 260,000 per month, corresponding to the E7 pay scale.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the General Manager (North) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the General Manager (North) position announced under this recruitment drive by NFDC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NFDC General Manager (North) recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the General Manager (North) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Manager (North) post will involve an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Film Development Corporation, which is www.nfdcindia.com.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates, as specified in the official notification.
